hindi: जय गणेश गिरिजा सुवन, श्री शनिदेव ने कहा। निश्चय मेरे भक्त को, मैं देता हूं सहा॥
english: After saluting Ganesha, Lord Shani declared; I surely support my true devotees
roman: Jai Ganesh Girija Suvan, Shri Shanidev Ne Kaha, Nishchay Mere Bhakt Ko, Main Deta Hoon Saha

hindi: जय जय श्री शनिदेव कृपाला। करत सदा भक्तन प्रतिपाला॥
english: Victory to merciful Lord Shani; always protecting and nurturing devotees
roman: Jai Jai Shri Shanidev Kripala, Karat Sada Bhaktan Pratipala

hindi: नीलाम्बर धारण महिमाशाली। गज की असवारी, मूरत काली॥
english: Wearing blue garments of great glory; riding an elephant, dark in form
roman: Nilambara Dharan Mahimashali, Gaj Ki Asavari Moorat Kali

hindi: छाया मातु, सूर्य पिता भारी। जन्म लिया कर्म सुधारी॥
english: Chhaya as mother, mighty Sun as father; born to set right the deeds of all
roman: Chhaya Matu Surya Pita Bhaari, Janm Liya Karma Sudhari

hindi: सूर्यपुत्र शनि कठोर न्यायी। बिना भेद सब पर चलाई॥
english: Shani, son of the Sun, is a stern dispenser of justice; applying the law without discrimination to all
roman: Suryaputra Shani Kathor Nyayi, Bina Bhed Sab Par Chalai

hindi: शनि चालीसा जो नर गावे। शनि दशा में सुख फल पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Shani Chalisa; attains good fruits even during Shani's period
roman: Shani Chalisa Jo Nar Gaave, Shani Dasha Mein Sukh Phal Paave

hindi: जय जय शनिदेव महाराजा। भक्तन के दुख काटो आजा॥
english: Victory to Shani Dev the great king; come and cut the sorrows of devotees
roman: Jai Jai Shanidev Maharaja, Bhaktan Ke Dukh Kato Aaja
